top3.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN a.alignment = 'neutral' OR a.alignment = 'good' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_self_interest_or_moral_code,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN a.alignment = 'neutral' OR a.alignment = 'good' AND p.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics' THEN 1 END) AS marvel_count
FROM superhero s
JOIN alignment a ON s.alignment_id = a.id
JOIN publisher p ON s.publisher_id = p.id;

SELECT 
    ROUND(COUNT(*) * 100.0 / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM superhero), 2) AS percentage_self_interested,
    SUM(CASE WHEN p.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS marvel_count
FROM superhero s
JOIN alignment a ON s.alignment_id = a.id
JOIN publisher p ON s.publisher_id = p.id
WHERE a.alignment IN ('neutral', 'good');

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN a.alignment = 'neutral' OR a.alignment = 'good' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_self_interest_or_moral_code,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN a.alignment = 'neutral' OR a.alignment = 'good' AND p.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics' THEN 1 END) AS marvel_count
FROM superhero s
JOIN alignment a ON s.alignment_id = a.id
JOIN publisher p ON s.publisher_id = p.id;

SELECT 
    ROUND(COUNT(*) * 100.0 / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM superhero), 2) AS percentage_self_interested,
    SUM(CASE WHEN p.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS marvel_count
FROM superhero s
JOIN alignment a ON s.alignment_id = a.id
JOIN publisher p ON s.publisher_id = p.id
WHERE a.alignment IN ('neutral', 'good');

SELECT 
    ROUND(CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN a.alignment IN ('neutral', 'good') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*), 2) AS percentage_self_interest_or_moral_code,
    SUM(CASE WHEN a.alignment IN ('neutral', 'good') AND p.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS marvel_count
FROM superhero s
JOIN alignment a ON s.alignment_id = a.id
JOIN publisher p ON s.publisher_id = p.id;

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN a.alignment = 'neutral' OR a.alignment = 'good' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_self_interest_or_moral_code,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN a.alignment = 'neutral' OR a.alignment = 'good' AND p.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics' THEN 1 END) AS marvel_count
FROM superhero s
JOIN alignment a ON s.alignment_id = a.id
JOIN publisher p ON s.publisher_id = p.id;

SELECT 
    ROUND(COUNT(*) * 100.0 / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM superhero), 2) AS percentage_self_interested,
    SUM(CASE WHEN p.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS marvel_count
FROM superhero s
JOIN alignment a ON s.alignment_id = a.id
JOIN publisher p ON s.publisher_id = p.id
WHERE a.alignment IN ('neutral', 'good');

SELECT 
    ROUND(CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN a.alignment IN ('neutral', 'good') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*), 2) AS percentage_self_interest_or_moral_code,
    SUM(CASE WHEN a.alignment IN ('neutral', 'good') AND p.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS marvel_count
FROM superhero s
JOIN alignment a ON s.alignment_id = a.id
JOIN publisher p ON s.publisher_id = p.id;

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN a.alignment = 'neutral' OR a.alignment = 'good' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_self_interest_or_moral_code,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN a.alignment = 'neutral' OR a.alignment = 'good' AND p.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics' THEN 1 END) AS marvel_count
FROM superhero s
JOIN alignment a ON s.alignment_id = a.id
JOIN publisher p ON s.publisher_id = p.id;
